---
title: "Welcome and Thank You for Visiting https://victorialiprojects.github.io/"
output: html_document
---

## Under construction

```{r sports, echo=FALSE}
library("jpeg")
jj <- readJPEG("images/underconstruction.jpg",native=TRUE)
plot(0:1,0:1,type="n",ann=FALSE,axes=FALSE)
rasterImage(jj,0,0,1,1)
```


## You can find me: 

linkedin.com/in/victoria-li-profile  or 

github.com/victorialiprojects
